name: cep_exists_order_insseg_subkey
drl: rule R when exists E1() P() then end
_finding: D-147 exists within-batch sub-key: at the SECOND re-fire, P2 and P3 share the last-touch epoch (both inserted in ep2), but P3's insert-segment is HIGHER (inserted after ep2's mid-epoch witness arrival) -> within the epoch batch, inserts order by ins_seg DESC then insertion: [3,2], initial P1 last. Sequence: [1] [2,1,3] then re-fire [3,2,1]. Engine pre-D-147 ordered [2,3] by insertion alone.
